chart_type: grouped bar chart, symmetric error bars
method: §4 bar fills via HSV (preserved from prior extraction); §4b upper error caps via horizontal black runs; lower caps mirrored as y_lo = mean - (y_hi - mean) and flagged `mirrored_lower_cap` in provenance column. x-positions snapped to categorical {24, 27, 30}.
phase4_evidence: All 8 bars display symmetric upper+lower whiskers matching the original; categorical x-positions align with the 24/27/30 tick labels; long-form legend strings ('Mean duration of GC1/2/3').
